All About Delivering
Value While Marketing
Then 	Selling!
Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 1 of 9 --

The Difference Between Marketing & Selling:!
•Marketing: All about 	your prospect 	- their
problems, their needs, their desires, their wants.!
•Selling: All about 	your product 	- the features, the
benefits, the offer.
Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 2 of 9 --

“The job of
marketing is to
make selling
superfluous”
Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
Peter Drucker

-- 3 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
6FFF Customer Captivation 	Presentation Outline:!
• 	The Hook!
• 	The Promise!
• 	Present Your Credentials!
• 	Reason Why (The Problem)!
• 	Provide Proof Points!
• 	Aggravate Problem!
• 	Introduce Your Mechanism!
• 	Show The Benefits!
• 	Provide Proof Points!
• 	Introduce Your Solution
• 	Features, Advantages, Benefits!
• 	Reveal Price (and ATC button)!
• 	CTA #1!
• 	Premiums/Bonuses!
• 	Risk-Reversal Statement!
• 	CTA #2!
• 	Urgency Reminder!
• 	Future Pace!
• 	CTA #3

-- 4 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
6FFF Customer Captivation 	Presentation Outline:!
• 	The Hook!
• 	The Promise!
• 	Present Your Credentials!
• 	Reason Why (The Problem)!
• 	Provide Proof Points!
• 	Aggravate Problem!
• 	Introduce Your Mechanism!
• 	Show The Benefits!
• 	Provide Proof Points!
• 	Introduce Your Solution
• 	Features, Advantages, Benefits!
• 	Reveal Price (and ATC button)!
• 	CTA #1!
• 	Premiums/Bonuses!
• 	Risk-Reversal Statement!
• 	CTA #2!
• 	Urgency Reminder!
• 	Future Pace!
• 	CTA #3
Marketing

-- 5 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
Understanding Feature, Advantage, Benefit:!
• An 	FAB Statement explains the feature, what it does
(the advantage), and how it benefits the prospect.!
• Features are facts or characteristics about your
product or service.!
• Advantages are what the features do.!
• Benefits answer why someone should value the
advantage. It connects the facts about your product to
a solution for your client.”

-- 6 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
Understanding Feature, Advantage, Benefit:
“Because it has (feature) you will be able
to do (advantage). What that means for
you is (benefit).”

-- 7 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
Example:
“Our sleeping bags have a 1 inch layer of
insulation on them. This helps to retain
body heat on cold nights. You’ll be warm
all night. Which means that you’ll get a
great sleep and be well rested for a day of
fun activities (that you’ll fully enjoy!).”

-- 8 of 9 --

Module 4 - Lesson 2
Constructing Your Customer Captivation Offer:
Questions To Help Flesh-Out Features, Advantages, Benefits:
•Why might the feature be advantageous? 	!
•What does it mean for the prospect? 	!
•What does it offer? 	!
•Why might the prospect 	like it?

-- 9 of 9 --
